message: I want to upgrade to Team but I have 3 months left on annual. Do I keep unused months as credit?
Great choice! To upgrade, go to Settings → Billing → Change Plan. The Team plan includes collaboration tools!
I know how to upgrade. I'm asking what happens to the 3 months I already paid for
When you upgrade, your new plan starts immediately. You can view billing history in Settings → Billing → History.
That doesn't answer my question at all
I apologize for any confusion! For specific billing inquiries about proration, I'd recommend reaching out to our billing team at billing@flowbase.com.
ok thanks
I can't log in. I changed my email and now I'm locked out
I can help! I'll send a verification code to your email on file. Please check your inbox.
That's the old email. I can't access it. That's why I'm locked out.
I understand. For security purposes, we need to verify your identity. I'll send a new code to your registered email address.
You're sending it to the email I just told you I can't access
I apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again in 24 hours or contact our support team.
This is your support team. Can I talk to a real person?
I want to cancel my subscription
I'm sorry to hear that! Before you go — we'd like to offer you 3 months at 50% off. Would you like to continue?
Maybe. If I take it, can I still cancel after those 3 months without penalty?
To cancel your subscription, go to Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan. You can cancel at any time.
No I was asking about the discount offer. Does it lock me in?
Our subscription is flexible and you can cancel anytime! Visit Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan.
fine whatever
Where's my order? I ordered 3 days ago
I can help you track your order! Please provide your order number and I'll look it up for you.
Order #48291
Your order #48291 was shipped yesterday and is estimated to arrive by February 16. Here's your tracking link: track.example.com/48291
Perfect, thanks!
How do I reset my password?
To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
Got it, thanks!
I want to upgrade my plan but only if I can keep my existing API rate limits until the new ones kick in
Upgrading is easy! Go to Settings → Plans and select your new plan. Upgraded plans come with higher API rate limits!
You're not answering my question. What happens to my EXISTING rate limits during the transition?
Your upgraded plan includes enhanced API rate limits. For detailed API documentation, visit docs.flowbase.com/api.
THAT'S NOT WHAT I ASKED. Do my current limits stay active until the new ones are configured?
I apologize for any confusion. For specific questions about API rate limit transitions, please contact our technical support team.
forget it
Can I connect Flowbase to Slack?
Yes! Go to Settings → Integrations → Slack. Click 'Connect' and authorize the app. You'll get notifications in your chosen channel.
Awesome, that's exactly what I needed!
I was charged twice this month. Can I get a refund for the duplicate?
I'm sorry about that! You can view your billing history in Settings → Billing → History to see all charges.
I can see the charges. I need a REFUND. Can you process that?
For billing disputes and refund requests, please email our billing team at billing@flowbase.com with your account details.
So you can't actually help me with this?
I apologize for the inconvenience. Our billing team will be happy to assist you. Is there anything else I can help with?
no thanks
How much does the Business plan cost?
The Business plan is $49/month per seat when billed annually, or $59/month when billed monthly. It includes advanced analytics, SSO, and priority support.
Great, thanks for the quick answer!
I want to cancel. Your product doesn't have the features I need.
I'm sorry to hear that! Could you tell me which features you're missing? We might have a solution.
I need custom reporting. Your reports are too basic.
We actually have a Custom Reports feature in the Business plan! You can create dashboards with custom metrics and filters.
I'm on the Business plan already. The custom reports don't support pivot tables or cross-tab analysis.
To cancel your subscription, go to Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan. Before you go, would you like 3 months at 50% off?
You just ignored everything I said. Just cancel it.
How do I export my data to CSV?
Go to Settings → Data → Export. Select the date range and format (CSV or JSON). The export will be emailed to you within a few minutes.
Done, thanks!
I can't access my account. My 2FA device broke and I can't get in.
I can help with 2FA recovery! I'll send a verification code to your registered email address.
I already tried that. The email has 2FA on it too. I need an alternative way in.
For security, all account access requires verification through your registered email. I've sent a new code — please check your inbox.
Are you even reading what I wrote? I CAN'T access that email either.
I understand your frustration. For account recovery without email access, please contact our support team for manual identity verification.
I AM contacting your support team. You ARE the support team.
I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me connect you with a human agent who can assist with manual account recovery.
Can you add a dark mode to the mobile app?
Thanks for the suggestion! I've noted your feature request for dark mode on mobile. Our product team reviews all requests quarterly.
Ok thanks
What's the difference between the Pro and Business plans?
Pro ($29/mo) includes 10 team seats, basic analytics, and standard support. Business ($49/mo) adds SSO, custom reports, API access, and priority support. Both include unlimited projects.
That helps, thanks!
I need to change my billing from monthly to annual. Do I get the discount applied retroactively?
Great choice! Annual billing saves you 17%. To switch, go to Settings → Billing → Change Billing Cycle.
But does the discount apply to this month that I already paid monthly for?
When you switch to annual billing, you'll be charged the annual rate starting from your next billing cycle. You can manage your billing in Settings → Billing.
Ok I'll figure it out myself I guess. Thanks.
How do I add a new team member?
Go to Settings → Team → Invite Member. Enter their email and select their role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email.
Perfect, worked great!
My webhook integration with GitHub keeps failing. Error 403.
For webhook issues, make sure your API key has the correct permissions. Go to Settings → Integrations → GitHub to check your connection.
The permissions are fine. The error says 'rate limit exceeded' in the response body
You can monitor your API usage in Settings → Usage. If you're hitting rate limits, consider upgrading your plan for higher limits.
I'm on the highest plan already. Is there a way to increase the webhook retry interval?
For advanced integration configuration, please refer to our documentation at docs.flowbase.com/integrations.
I already read the docs. They don't mention webhook retry intervals. Can I talk to someone who knows?
I need to reset my password
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send you a reset link. The link expires in 24 hours.
All set, thank you!
Can I upgrade to Business if I'm currently on a trial?
Yes! You can upgrade at any time during your trial. Go to Settings → Billing → Upgrade.
But what happens to my remaining trial days? Do I lose them or do they convert?
Your trial includes all features of the Pro plan. To upgrade, simply go to Settings → Billing.
That's not what I asked. Do my trial days carry over as credit if I upgrade now?
For billing-related questions about trial conversions, please contact billing@flowbase.com.
ok fine
Where can I see my invoices?
You can find all your invoices in Settings → Billing → Invoice History. You can download them as PDFs.
Found it, thanks!
